description: Stage-2 (R4 SD JSON -> R5 internal-model JSON) conversion goldens. Each *.converted.json is the R5-internal model emitted by SnapOracleR4 --dump-converted (raw converted form: no sortDifferential, no setIds, no generateSnapshot). Oracle pinned at fhir-core commit 5c4d5a0ff, jar org.hl7.fhir.r5-6.9.10-SNAPSHOT.

oracle.note: Conversion is context-free: --dump-converted needs no package context and no base. All 39 goldens were generated in two batched invocations with only hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1 loaded (never consulted). A --dump-converted-sorted variant exists that additionally runs sortDifferential+setIds; it DOES require a resolvable base in the package context and was not used for these unsorted goldens.

groups.packageContext: none required (context-free). Harvest package context for reference: hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1 hl7.fhir.uv.ipa#1.1.0 hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0
groups.conversionTraits: choice-path elements (Observation value[x]/effective[x]), markdown fields, contact/mapping/context backbones, nested BackboneElement (Bundle/Composition sections).

fixtures.name: us-core-observation-lab
fixtures.traits: constraint.xpath -> extension (us-core-4 constraint carries elementdefinition-bestpractice FIRST then xpath extension appended LAST); choice paths (valueCodeableConcept).

fixtures.name: us-core-genderIdentity
fixtures.traits: elementdefinition-bindingName binding extension copied VERBATIM (NOT projected into binding.additional[]); Extension.value[x] choice.

fixtures.name: us-core-medicationrequest
fixtures.traits: elementdefinition-maxValueSet binding extension copied VERBATIM; binding.description string->markdown; largest us-core differential.

fixtures.name: us-core-head-circumference
fixtures.traits: choice-path differential rows (valueQuantity); vital-signs component slicing.

groups.packageContext: none required. Harvest context: hl7.fhir.us.core#9.0.0 closure (package-deps.cjs).

fixtures.name: qicore-observation-clinical-result
fixtures.traits: elementdefinition-bindingName / additional binding fodder, choice paths.

groups.packageContext: none required. Harvest context: hl7.fhir.us.qicore#6.0.0 closure.

fixtures.traits: 2 constraint.xpath -> extension conversions on root Library constraints; mapping[] backbones (string->markdown comment).

fixtures.name: sdc-valueset
fixtures.traits: choice paths; 67 differential elements; extension/modifierExtension slice anchors.

groups.packageContext: none required. Harvest context: hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1 hl7.fhir.uv.xver-r5.r4#0.1.0 hl7.fhir.r4.examples#4.0.1 hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0.

fixtures.name: mcode-cancer-stage
fixtures.traits: empty-string primitive drop: differential Observation.value[x] carries comment:"" in R4; converted output DROPS the comment key entirely (PrimitiveType.hasValue() is false for blank).

fixtures.traits: empty-string primitive drop: a slicing.description:"" in R4; converted output drops it. 49 differential elements, heavy slicing.
